# deps/apt.txt — Debian/Ubuntu packages for Homebrew-less Linux machines.
#
# Used only when ferry detects `apt` as the active manager (no Homebrew present).
# One package per line; blank lines and `#` comments are ignored, and an inline
# trailing `#` comment is stripped. Installed by the gated `ferry apply --deps`
# step via apt-get. There is no per-machine `.local` overlay for apt.
#
# This is a hand-curated set, not a machine dump: apt has no clean "dump the
# installed set" equivalent, so `ferry capture` treats apt as apply-only and
# never rewrites this file.

# --- Shell ---
zsh
zsh-autosuggestions
zsh-syntax-highlighting
direnv

# NOTE: zoxide is NOT packaged on older Debian/Ubuntu releases. On recent
# releases `apt install zoxide` works; on older ones install it out-of-band
# (cargo install zoxide, or the upstream install script). Left here for
# recent releases; harmless to remove if unavailable.
zoxide

# --- Core CLI ---
coreutils
git
git-lfs
gh
ripgrep
tmux
pandoc

# --- Languages / runtimes ---
golang
nodejs
pipx

# --- Dev tooling ---
shellcheck
bats
pre-commit
